nodes.context: 'Ndrina composed of two families operating in Chiaravalle Centrale, Torre di Ruggiero, and Cardinale, under the Locale di Serra San Bruno.
Local 'ndrangheta cell that the Iozzo-Chiefari answer to.
'Ndrina targeted in operation Anteo alongside Iozzo-Chiefari.

edges.evidence_quote: Fanno capo al Locale di Serra San Bruno.
edges.context: Iozzo-Chiefari are subordinate to the Locale di Serra San Bruno.

edges.evidence_quote: 17 maggio 2021: operazione "Anteo" contro i Giorgi , i Mancuso , i Soriano , gli Iozzo-Chiefari e i Sia-Procopio .
edges.context: Iozzo-Chiefari and Giorgi were both targeted in the same police operation Anteo.
